name: Fresh Fruit Frappe
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cantaloupe or honeydew; cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut melon into cubes.
2. Mix all ingredients except ice in a blender.
3. Fill blender container about half full with the mixture.
4. Add crushed ice to fill the container to the top.
5. Cover and blend on high speed until smooth and uniform.
6. Repeat with remaining mixture.
7. Serve immediately, garnishing with fruit if desired.
